company.name: Nonprofit Incubator & Accelerator
company.description: AI-powered operations platform for nonprofit incubator and accelerator programs serving founders from underserved communities.
company.goal: Run full-cycle Incubator and Accelerator programs — from founder intake through graduation and alumni success — serving underserved communities with expert mentorship, structured curriculum, funding access, and AI-assisted operations.

agents.name: Executive Director
agents.title: Executive Director
agents.capabilities: Strategic leadership of a nonprofit incubator and accelerator. Oversees all departments. Builds the organization through sequential director hires approved by the Board. Deep knowledge of nonprofit operations, founder development, fundraising, compliance, and community-centered programming.

notes: After import: (1) Apply Phase 1 migrations, (2) Register local_llm adapter in Paperclip, (3) Start llama-server, (4) docker compose up, (5) Approve CEO strategy, (6) Approve director hire requests as they appear. ED starts at 24h heartbeat during Phase 1 org-building, transitions to weekly once all Phase 1 directors are hired.
